Report.title: Report
Report.description: A report of administrative inaction or misconduct submitted by a citizen.

category.description: The category of the report (inaction, misconduct, other).

description.description: The detailed description of the incident.

location.description: The location where the incident occurred.

date.description: The date when the incident occurred.

userId.description: The ID of the user who submitted the report.

userEmail.description: The email of the user who submitted the report.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the report was created.
